metadata.title: WebMundial 26 · Ranking
metadata.description: Social and competitive platform around the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Predict matches, climb the ranking, unlock achievements.

leaderboard.tagline: FIFA World Cup · Canada · Mexico · USA
leaderboard.marketingCopy: Predict 2026 World Cup matches for free. Compete with friends or anyone in the world, climb the ranking and unlock achievements.

modal.title: Join the 2026 World Cup
modal.subtitle: Predict matches, climb the ranking and unlock achievements.
modal.footer: Your data is only used to identify you in the ranking
modal.faqLink: How does it work? Read the FAQ →

onboarding.title: Welcome
onboarding.subtitle: Confirm your public name and country. 30 seconds and you're in.

step1.heading: Your public name
step1.usernameHint: This is how others see you on your profile, the ranking and achievements. Keep the generated one or change it (3-20 chars, lowercase, digits and hyphens).
step1.privacyNote: Your country is only used to show your flag on the ranking and your profile. We don't share it with anyone and you can hide it any time from Settings › Privacy.

step2.heading: How scoring works
step2.simpleDesc: Pick who wins (or a draw). The safe one.
step2.exactDesc: Nail the exact result and triple the points.
step2.streakDesc: 3, 5 or 10 in a row add bonus points on top of what you scored.

step3.heading: All set!
step3.body: Your account is configured. Let's predict.

error.usernameInvalid: Invalid username: 3-20 chars, lowercase letters, digits and hyphens.
error.usernameTaken: That username is taken. Try another.
error.invalidInput: Some field is invalid. Check the form.
error.unauthorized: Your session expired. Sign in again.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Choose who can open your profile. Changes apply instantly.

visibility.intro: The ranking always shows your basic info (name, flag, points). This only controls whether someone can open your full profile.

public.title: Public
public.desc: Anyone with the URL sees your full profile. Recommended for open competition.

friends_only.title: Friends only
friends_only.desc: Only your friends. Behaves like private until the friends system lands.

private.title: Private
private.desc: Only you. Anyone trying to open your profile sees the "Private profile" card.

empty.title: No predictions yet
empty.body: When you submit your first prediction, it will show up here with the result and the points you earned.

empty.title: No matches here yet
empty.body: We're waiting on the next round of fixtures. As soon as they're announced, you'll see them here with their date and kick-off time.

predictionStub.body: The form to submit simple/exact/double predictions is on the way. Meanwhile you can see the match detail here.

closedWindow.bodyHadPrediction: Your prediction was saved before kick-off and it's being scored.
closedWindow.bodyNoPrediction: Predictions close at the kick-off whistle. Don't sleep on it next time.

predictions.subtitle: The more you risk, the more points you take home.

type.title: How do you want to bet?
type.winnerHint: Pick who wins, or call a draw.
type.exactHint: Go for the exact score and multiply your points.

summary.potential: If you're right, you score +{points} points.
summary.potentialMax: Up to {points} points on the line

errors.fallback: Couldn't save the prediction. Try again.
errors.match_window_closed: The match already started. Predictions close at kick-off.
errors.match_already_started: The match already started. Predictions close at kick-off.
errors.kind_not_allowed_for_stage: This prediction kind doesn't apply to this stage.
errors.simple_missing_winner: Pick one of the three outcomes.
errors.simple_draw_in_knockout: There's no official draw in knockouts. Pick home or away.
errors.exact_unreasonable_scores: That score is unrealistic. Try something more reasonable.
errors.double_has_winner_or_scores: Doubles don't carry a specific score or winner.

private.title: This profile is closed
private.body: This player chose not to share their profile. They still appear in the ranking, but you can't see the details.

progress.lastUnlocked: Last: {title} · {days, plural, =0 {today} =1 {1 d ago} other {# d ago}}
progress.sparklineAria: Your position trend over the last days

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page doesn't exist or has been moved. Head back to the ranking and keep predicting.

runtime.title: Something went wrong
runtime.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again or go home.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to predict, score points and unlock achievements.

scoring.title: Scoring table
scoring.subtitle: How many points each action is worth.

simple.label: Simple correct prediction
simple.note: You called the winner or the draw, without exact score.

exact.label: Exact correct prediction
exact.note: You called the exact score. Replaces the simple bonus, not added.

double.label: Correct double prediction
double.note: You covered 2 of the 3 outcomes (1X, X2 or 12). Half of the simple.

fail.label: Miss
fail.note: If you don't get it right, 0 points and your streak resets.

comboBase.label: Streak bonus at 3 / 5 / 10
comboBase.note: Awarded when reaching 3, 5 or 10 consecutive correct predictions.

comboModified.label: Streak bonus with doubles in the run
comboModified.note: If your active streak contains a correct double, bonuses are reduced.

pollParticipate.label: Take part in the daily poll
pollParticipate.note: Just for answering before the cutoff.

pollCorrect.label: Get the poll right
pollCorrect.note: On top of participating. Maximum +2 per poll.

referral.label: Your referral lands their 1st correct prediction
referral.note: One-time per invited friend. Just inviting doesn't grant points.

dailyLogin.label: Daily login
dailyLogin.note: No points awarded. Unlocks achievements visible in your public profile.

questions.title: Common questions
questions.subtitle: Rules that affect how you predict and how your score is calculated.

doublePrediction.q: How does a double prediction work?
doublePrediction.a: You can cover two of the three possible outcomes in a match: 1X (home or draw), X2 (draw or away) or 12 (either team wins). If you hit, you score half the points of a simple prediction. Doubles can't include an exact score. In knockout matches, 1X and X2 don't apply because there's no official draw.

predictionWindow.a: At the official kick-off. Until then you can edit it as many times as you want: the last version submitted before the lock counts. Predictions open as soon as the match exists in the system (from the start of the tournament).

postponedCancelled.q: What if a match is postponed or cancelled?
postponedCancelled.a: If postponed, your prediction stays and remains editable until the new kick-off. If cancelled, the prediction is voided with 0 points and your streak 'skips' the match without breaking: the next correct prediction continues the streak.

knockoutScoring.q: What about extra time and penalties in the knockouts?
knockoutScoring.a: Exact score counts the result at the end of extra time (120'), without adding penalty kicks. The winner does include penalties if needed. In knockouts, 'draw' is not a valid simple prediction because there's always an official winner.

provisional.a: While a match is live, you see the points you would earn if it ended with the current score. They're tagged as provisional and confirmed when the match officially closes. Your streak and combo milestones only move with confirmed points, not provisional ones.

streakAndCombo.q: How do streaks and combos work?
streakAndCombo.a: Your streak is the number of consecutive correct predictions without a miss. Reaching 3, 5 or 10 in a row awards a bonus. If your active streak contains any correct double, the bonus is reduced. A miss resets the streak to 0. The 🔥 'On streak' label appears from the 3rd consecutive correct prediction.

achievements.a: Badges you unlock by meeting conditions (streaks, first correct, top 100, etc.). They award no points: they're cosmetic and shown on your public profile. There are 24 achievements across 6 rarity tiers, from 'Common' to 'GOAT'.

username.a: Once, ever. After exercising the change, it's fixed. Your old username stays reserved to you; nobody else can register it.

deleteAccount.q: How do I delete my account?
deleteAccount.a: From your account menu. Deletion is total: your user, predictions, points, streak and achievements are removed from the database. The leaderboard is recalculated without you. Complies with the GDPR right to be forgotten.

profileEditor.cooldownToast: You can only change this every 48h ({hours}h left).

invitations.title: My invitations
invitations.emptyBody: You haven't invited anyone yet. Soon you'll be able to share a link so your friends can play with you.

feedback.ok: Request sent. We'll notify you when accepted.

error.already_pending: You already have an open request with that person.

list.empty: No friends yet on WebMundial. Share your profile so they find you.

optIn.title: Push notifications
optIn.body: Get pinged when a friend sends a request, when a match is published, and when your predictions are scored. No spam.
optIn.denied: You've blocked notifications in this browser. To re-enable, go to your browser settings and allow notifications for this site.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: What data we keep, why, and how you stay in control.

intro.heading: Quick summary
intro.body: WebMundial 26 is a prediction game for the 2026 World Cup. To play we need the bare minimum: your Google identity (email, name, picture) and optionally your country. We don't sell your data, we don't run third-party advertising, and you can ask us to delete your account whenever you want.

controller.heading: Data controller
controller.body: The controller of your data is Héctor Escolante (indie personal project). You can reach us any time at hector.escolante@clouddistrict.com.

dataCollected.heading: What data we collect
dataCollected.body:
1) Google identity: email, name, profile picture. Needed to create your account via Auth.js + Google OAuth.
2) Country: you choose it in the /bienvenido wizard. Used only to show your flag on the ranking.
3) Username: you pick it. It's public and part of your profile URL (/u/username).
4) Game activity: predictions, points, streaks, achievements. Generated by your normal use of the product.
5) Last activity: timestamp to show the green online indicator (24h) on the ranking.
6) If you set a gallery avatar or change your name: we store a timestamp to enforce the 48h cooldown between changes.

purpose.heading: What we use the data for
purpose.body: To make the game work: identify you, compute your points, show you on the ranking, unlock achievements, prevent abuse (rate-limits), and resolve bugs if you contact us. We don't profile you or use the data for advertising.

legalBasis.heading: Legal basis (GDPR)
legalBasis.body: Processing is based on the performance of the service you request when you sign up (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR) and our legitimate interest in preventing abuse (rate-limits, anonymized logs — Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR). If you enable Sentry or analytics, we'll always do it under a clear legal basis and notify you.

thirdParties.heading: Third parties we share data with
thirdParties.body:
Only the ones needed to operate the service:
— Google (authentication): your identity goes through their OAuth flow.
— Railway (hosting + PostgreSQL database in the EU).
— api-football (World Cup data): we don't send any of your data, we only receive public match data.
— Sentry (error monitoring, optional): if enabled, error traces are sent with your truncated user_id for debugging. PII (email, name) is scrubbed before sending.
— Upstash Redis (rate-limit, optional): only anonymous per-IP counters are stored.

retention.heading: How long we keep your data
retention.body: As long as your account is active. If you ask us to delete your account, we'll remove all personal information within at most 30 days. Error/operational logs are deleted automatically after 90 days.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: You have the right to access, rectify, erase, object to processing, port your data, and restrict its use (Arts. 15-22 GDPR). To exercise them, write to hector.escolante@clouddistrict.com. You can also lodge a complaint with the Spanish data protection authority (AEPD) if you feel we haven't responded properly.

cookies.heading: Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: We use only technical cookies (Auth.js session, language preference). We don't use third-party, analytics or advertising cookies. That's why we don't show a cookie banner — GDPR/ePrivacy allows it when only strictly necessary technical cookies are used.

changes.heading: Changes to this policy
changes.body: If we change anything material, we'll update the "last updated" date above and notify you in-app or by email. Minor changes (fixing typos, reorganizing sections) don't require notification.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: If you have privacy questions or want to exercise any right, write to hector.escolante@clouddistrict.com. We'll reply within 30 days.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.subtitle: The rules of the game and your account.

intro.heading: Acceptance
intro.body: By creating an account or using WebMundial 26 you accept these terms. If you don't agree with something, simply don't use the app and, if you already have an account, write to us to delete it.

eligibility.heading: Who can play
eligibility.body: Anyone with a Google account and at least 14 years old (legal minimum in Spain to process personal data without parental consent). If you are a minor, make sure you have your parent/guardian's permission.

account.heading: Your account
account.body: Each user has one account. You are responsible for its use. If we detect multiple accounts of the same user to inflate the ranking, we may suspend them. You can request to delete your account at any time from Settings or by email.

gameplay.heading: Game rules
gameplay.body: Scoring rules (simple, exact, double predictions, streaks, combos) are documented in /faq and in docs/scoring.md. They are not subject to arbitrary changes; any modification is announced before it affects future matches and never affects already-consolidated points retroactively.

userContent.heading: Content you generate
userContent.body: Your name, username, and predictions are visible to other users according to your privacy settings. You keep ownership of that content; we just display it in the product. We don't reuse your content for commercial purposes.

conduct.heading: Expected behavior
conduct.body: Don't use the app for: harassment, offensive language in your name/username, attempts to manipulate the ranking (multi-account, bots), API abuse, reverse engineering, or attacks against the service. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these rules.

intellectualProperty.heading: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.body: The code, design, copy, and "WebMundial 26" brand are owned by Héctor Escolante. The 2026 World Cup match data comes from api-football and is owned by its respective holders. Don't reproduce the app without permission.

termination.heading: Termination
termination.body: You can stop using the app at any time. We can suspend or close your account if you violate these terms. In any case, already-consolidated points stay until the end of the tournament unless a serious rule violation occurred.

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
disclaimer.body: WebMundial 26 is an entertainment game. It is not a gambling service: there are no monetary prizes. The app is provided "as is", with no warranty of uninterrupted availability. If the external provider data (api-football) arrives late or with errors, we do our best to correct them but can't guarantee absolute accuracy.

liability.heading: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the extent allowed by law, we are not liable for indirect damages, lost profits, or data loss arising from the use of the app. For consumer users in the EU, this does not limit the non-waivable rights the law grants you.

changes.heading: Changes to the terms
changes.body: We can update these terms. If the change is material, we'll notify you in-app or by email before it takes effect.

governingLaw.heading: Governing law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the competent courts are those of the user's city of residence (EU consumers) or those of Madrid if no consumer status applies.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Any questions about these terms: hector.escolante@clouddistrict.com.
